titleStmt.title: SII 22.212: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 212. (A.R. No. 212 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, PĒRAṄGIYŪR. RUINED ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE.

summary.p: This consists of the concluding portions of two inscriptions. It seems possible that one of them might form part of No. 218 below. The other portion which is noticed here is dated in••••••••••• trayōdaśi, Saturday, Punarvasu and registers a sale of land about 150 kuḻi in extent by one Nelvaṅgai Pārthasārathi- Bhaṭṭaṉ a member of the Āḷuṅgaṇam of Pēriṅgūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Mūlasthānam-uḍaiya-Paramasvāmi. The writing is of about the 11th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
trayodaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattināḷ rāja rājavaḷanāṭṭut tirumuṉaippāṭip periṅkūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam periṅkūrāḷuṅ kaṇat tāruḷ nelvaṅkaip pārttasārati paṭṭaṉe
n nilavilaiyāvaṇam Ivvūr Uṭaiyār śrī mulastānamuṭaiya paramasvāmi tirukkoyilil Āti śaṇḍeśvarap piḷḷaiyārkku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu melkaḻaṉi śrī vāṉavaṉ māte
vivatikku meṟku Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟcatirattum nāṉ En tamaiyaṉ śrī kṛṣṇapaṭṭan pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭai
yenāy Ennutāyirunta nilam tirunantavāṉattoṭu meṟkaṭainta kaṭai kaṇṇi taṭi Oṉṟināl kuḻi nūṟṟaimpattuccinnamum Ikkuḻi 100 5 10- ttuc ciṉnamum mikutikkuṟai Uḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukku
ṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 Ik kācu Iraṇṭukkum Innilam viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭutteṉ nelvaṅkan pārttasārati paṭṭanen IppiramāṇaStops here
Digital edition of SII 22.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
